response.global_analysis: The video features a medley of two songs: 'サマーチョコレート' (Summer Chocolate) and '恋するフォーチュンクッキー' (Koi Suru Fortune Cookie). The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON lyrics, but the video contains extended instrumental sections and spoken introductions in English and Japanese. I have transcribed the sung lyrics, the discrete spoken dialogue (introductions), and relevant on-screen titles. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, ensuring no bleed across audio pauses. Discarded the unused portions of the Reference JSON that do not appear in this 5-minute segment.
